text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru doesn't show up<n>for training,
so I go and look for her...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The omen to beware of lightning...<n>again?! But
why? It's so sunny<n>outside...
choice_data_list: You're busy with divining, I see...
You're busy with divining, I see...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Upon closer inspection... Th-those<n>clouds look kind
of menacing, right?
choice_data_list: Aren't you forgetting something? Starts with a t, ends with a raining...
Aren't you forgetting something? Starts with a t, ends with a raining...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I give her a storm of a scolding so<n>this doesn't
happen again.
